creator: georg@graf.priv.at
text:
Dear all,

I am not using this port anymore and hence my maintainership of this port has gotten really
bad. If possible, I'd like to resign from maintainership.

Thank you very much.

Georg Graf


On Fri, Jan 11, 2013 at 09:40:10AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/py-milter,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/175203 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175203
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
Georg Graf
Hagenberggasse 33, A-1130 Wien
+43 680 2083606
PGP Key ID: 0xA5232AD5
